'''hathaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cdki|cdki]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-th-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cdki|cdki]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hathaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæthæjæth|hæthæjæth]] || [[word:hæthæjæj|hæthæjæj]] || [[word:hæthæjæsh|hæthæjæsh]] || [[word:hæthæjæ|hæthæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hathathajath|hathathajath]] || [[word:hathathajaj|hathathajaj]] || [[word:hathathajash|hathathajash]] || [[word:hathathaja|hathathaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hathajath|hathajath]] || [[word:hathajaj|hathajaj]] || [[word:hathajash|hathajash]] || [[word:hathaja|hathaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hathafjath|hathafjath]] || [[word:hathafjaj|hathafjaj]] || [[word:hathafjash|hathafjash]] || [[word:hathafjaf|hathafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hathajatha|hathajatha]] || [[word:hathajaja|hathajaja]] || [[word:hathajasha|hathajasha]] || [[word:hathajaka|hathajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hathajath|hathajath]] || [[word:hathajaj|hathajaj]] || [[word:hathajash|hathajash]] || [[word:hathaja|hathaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hathajathal|hathajathal]] || [[word:hathajajal|hathajajal]] || [[word:hathajashal|hathajashal]] || [[word:hathajakal|hathajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hathajathatha|hathajathatha]] || [[word:hathajajaja|hathajajaja]] || [[word:hathajashasha|hathajashasha]] || [[word:hathajaka|hathajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hathajathan|hathajathan]] || [[word:hathajajan|hathajajan]] || [[word:hathajashan|hathajashan]] || [[word:hathajakan|hathajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hathajathaoro|hathajathaoro]] || [[word:hathajajaoro|hathajajaoro]] || [[word:hathajashaoro|hathajashaoro]] || [[word:hathajakaoro|hathajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
